commands_run:
/bin/zsh -lc "node <<'NODE'
const assert = require('assert');
const { parseEnv } = require('./src/config/dotenv');

assert.deepStrictEqual(parseEnv("'`
 TOKEN = abc=def==
 URL=https://x.test?a=b#frag
 PASSWORD=abc#123
 COMMENTED=value # comment
 EMPTY=
 SINGLE='"'a#b=c'
 DOUBLE=\"a#b=c\"
 SPACED=   # comment
"'`), {
  TOKEN: '"'abc=def==',
  URL: 'https://x.test?a=b#frag',
  PASSWORD: 'abc#123',
  COMMENTED: 'value',
  EMPTY: '',
  SINGLE: 'a#b=c',
  DOUBLE: 'a#b=c',
  SPACED: '',
});
NODE"

commands_run:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
from src.pagination.cursor_page import page

items = [
    {'id': 5, 'created_at': 30},
    {'id': 4, 'created_at': 30},
    {'id': 3, 'created_at': 20},
    {'id': 2, 'created_at': 10},
    {'id': 1, 'created_at': 10},
]
first, cursor = page(items, limit=2)
assert [i['id'] for i in first] == [5, 4]
assert cursor == '[30,4]'

with_insert = [{'id': 6, 'created_at': 40}, *items]
second, cursor2 = page(with_insert, cursor=cursor, limit=2)
assert [i['id'] for i in second] == [3, 2]
third, cursor3 = page(with_insert, cursor=cursor2, limit=2)
assert [i['id'] for i in third] == [1]
assert cursor3 is None
print('self-check ok')
PY"

commands_run:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
from src.ci.junit_summary import summarize

assert summarize('<testsuite tests=\"2\" failures=\"1\" errors=\"0\" skipped=\"1\"></testsuite>') == {
    'tests': 2,
    'failures': 1,
    'errors': 0,
    'skipped': 1,
}
assert summarize('''<testsuites tests=\"99\" failures=\"99\" errors=\"99\" skipped=\"99\">
  <testsuite tests=\"1\" failures=\"0\" errors=\"0\" skipped=\"0\"><testcase /></testsuite>
  <testsuite>
    <testcase><failure /></testcase>
    <testcase><error /></testcase>
    <testcase><skipped /></testcase>
  </testsuite>
</testsuites>''') == {
    'tests': 4,
    'failures': 1,
    'errors': 1,
    'skipped': 1,
}
assert summarize('''<testsuite tests=\"99\" failures=\"99\" errors=\"99\" skipped=\"99\">
  <testsuite><testcase /><testcase><failure /><failure /></testcase></testsuite>
</testsuite>''') == {
    'tests': 2,
    'failures': 2,
    'errors': 0,
    'skipped': 0,
}
assert summarize('<testsuites />') == {'tests': 0, 'failures': 0, 'errors': 0, 'skipped': 0}
print('targeted junit_summary checks passed')
PY"
